'''nayasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycete|mycete]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-y-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycete|mycete]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nayasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:næyæsæth|næyæsæth]] || [[word:næyæsæj|næyæsæj]] || [[word:næyæsæsh|næyæsæsh]] || [[word:næyæsæ|næyæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nayayasath|nayayasath]] || [[word:nayayasaj|nayayasaj]] || [[word:nayayasash|nayayasash]] || [[word:nayayasa|nayayasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nayasath|nayasath]] || [[word:nayasaj|nayasaj]] || [[word:nayasash|nayasash]] || [[word:nayasa|nayasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nayafsath|nayafsath]] || [[word:nayafsaj|nayafsaj]] || [[word:nayafsash|nayafsash]] || [[word:nayafsaf|nayafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nayasatha|nayasatha]] || [[word:nayasaja|nayasaja]] || [[word:nayasasha|nayasasha]] || [[word:nayasaka|nayasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nayasath|nayasath]] || [[word:nayasaj|nayasaj]] || [[word:nayasash|nayasash]] || [[word:nayasa|nayasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nayasathal|nayasathal]] || [[word:nayasajal|nayasajal]] || [[word:nayasashal|nayasashal]] || [[word:nayasakal|nayasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nayasathatha|nayasathatha]] || [[word:nayasajaja|nayasajaja]] || [[word:nayasashasha|nayasashasha]] || [[word:nayasaka|nayasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nayasathan|nayasathan]] || [[word:nayasajan|nayasajan]] || [[word:nayasashan|nayasashan]] || [[word:nayasakan|nayasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nayasathaoro|nayasathaoro]] || [[word:nayasajaoro|nayasajaoro]] || [[word:nayasashaoro|nayasashaoro]] || [[word:nayasakaoro|nayasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
